name: roughlogic
description: Field math for the trades. A 100% client-side static site.

scripts.lint: node scripts/grep-checks.mjs && node scripts/check-ngrams.mjs && node scripts/check-v6-discipline.mjs && node scripts/check-manifests.mjs && node scripts/check-csp.mjs && node scripts/check-citation-freshness.mjs && node scripts/build-citation-strings.mjs --check && node scripts/check-discoverability.mjs && node scripts/check-slots.mjs && node scripts/check-us-defaults.mjs && node scripts/check-readme-counts.mjs && node scripts/check-doc-links.mjs && node scripts/check-worked-examples.mjs && node scripts/check-tile-meta.mjs && node scripts/check-related-tiles.mjs && node scripts/check-wiring.mjs && node scripts/check-multiline-inputs.mjs && node scripts/check-dead-inputs.mjs && node scripts/check-sw-precache.mjs && node scripts/check-module-sizes.mjs && node scripts/check-home-payload.mjs && node scripts/build-corpus.mjs --check && node scripts/build-tile-index.mjs --check && node scripts/check-cross-validation.mjs && node scripts/check-dimensions.mjs && node scripts/check-citation-coverage.mjs && node scripts/check-audit-trail.mjs && node scripts/check-derivation-coverage.mjs && node scripts/check-bounds.mjs && node scripts/check-tile-contract.mjs
scripts.clean: node -e "import('node:fs').then(f => f.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }))"
